issueToken(address,address,string,string.details: Only the contract owner can issue tokens.Note: While the function returns the new token ID, when executed as a state-changing transaction, Remix will not display the return value automatically. revokeToken(string).notice: Revokes an existing token (certificate) by its unique token ID.
